description: Frozen snapshot of the first profitable SMC configuration using ICT model. This strategy uses H4 bias, M15 setup zone, and M1 entry timing with M15 structural swing points for SL and risk-reward ratio for TP.

config.note: This is a frozen snapshot. Do not modify the implementation (GodSmcStrategy). All future changes must use new implementations.

description: ICT Silver Bullet strategy: liquidity sweep + displacement + FVG entry during 3 precise time windows (London Open 3-4AM, NY AM 10-11AM, NY PM 2-3PM). Targets opposite liquidity with minimum 1:2 R:R.

config.note: ICT Silver Bullet — mechanical strategy with strict time window entries

description: High-frequency scalping on M5 Fair Value Gap fills. Targets 4:1 R:R ($20 win / $5 risk) with 5-15 trades per day across London, NY AM, and NY PM sessions.

config.note: FVG Scalp Conservative — M5 FVG bounce with strict displacement + confirmation filters

description: Aggressive FVG scalping: 5-15 trades/day. Looser FVG detection (no displacement required), wider sessions (01-21 UTC), lower M1 confirmation bar. Same risk management as conservative.

config.note: FVG Scalp Aggressive — more trades, looser filters, near-24h sessions

description: Displacement continuation: rides momentum after strong M1 pushes. Enters on pullback into FVGs created by the displacement. Works in volatile/impulsive markets where FVG bounce fails.

config.note: Momentum Scalp — displacement continuation for volatile markets

description: Fades fake breakouts on Volatility 25 synthetic index. Detects consolidation ranges, waits for inducement sweep beyond range, enters fade when price rejects back inside. 24/7, no session filters.

config.note: V25 EMA Scalp — EMA 8/21 crossover + breakout on M5 (24/7)
